title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: - Current “runtime smoke” is not a real E2E startup proof for supported path. It uses `SMOKE_RESULT_MARKER` and exits from launcher’s synthetic ACK path before bootstrap and guard launch. [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L161](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L161) [codex-prompt-launch#L369](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L369) [codex-prompt-launch#L397](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L397) [codex-prompt-launch#L409](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L409) - No-session bypass must be explicitly avoided; guard allows it for help/version style commands only. [cli.py#L139](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py#L139) - Required Claude+GLM proof already exists in guard path via bootstrap evidence validation and provider gate; canary should assert that this path was actually exercised. [cli.py#L62](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py#L62) [cli.py#L544](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py#L544) **Recommended smallest real E2E canary shape** - Add one new canary script/test (keep old smoke as prompt-ack test only). - Run via supported path only: `codex-prompt-launch kernel "<short canary task>"` under PTY, with: - `CODEX_KERNEL_PROVIDER_CHECK=1` - `CODEX_KERNEL_REQUIRE_GUARD=1` - `CODEX_KERNEL_USE_GUARD_LAUNCH=1` - `CODEX_KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_LANES=1` - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_STATE_ROOT=/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/<unique-canary-dir>` (isolated evidence) - Hard timeout: 90s (or 120s max), fail-closed on timeout/nonzero. - Assertions (deterministic, minimal): - Exit code is `0`. - Output includes `preflight: PASS` (guard path reached). - A fresh bootstrap evidence file exists in isolated root and has both `{provider: claude, ok: true}` and `{provider: glm, ok: true}`. - `~/.codex/state_5.sqlite` shows at least one new thread for repo `cwd` created after canary start, with non-empty `rollout_path` file present. - Explicitly fail if no new thread is found (prevents any hidden no-session success path). - Do not rely on model text markers for pass/fail (only process/evidence/state checks).
